title: Tour v2
description: App-agnostic click-through tour format. Mirrored field-for-field by internal/tour (Go, manifest_v2.go) and tools/runstatus/src/tour/types-v2.ts. Keep all three in lockstep.

origin.description: Exact-match origin the tour is bound to (e.g. https://app.example.com). Omitted for origin-agnostic fixtures.

kind.description: gate is the default kind for click-through tours: the user performs the real action and the tour reacts. act is the consent-gated agentic tier.

policy.description: Consent tier for act steps. act defaults to confirm when omitted.

interaction.description: Whether the live page beneath the overlay may be clicked during this step.

viewport.description: Scroll-container id/testid this step scrolls within, when not the window.

data.description: Opaque per-step payload. Used by converters (e.g. the v1 legacy compat path) to carry fields with no first-class v2 slot without inventing new format surface.

targetBundle.description: Ranked multi-anchor bundle. Resolution order: role+name -> testid -> label/text -> fuzzy css -> ancestor-scoped fallback. A heal event is emitted whenever the primary anchor misses and a secondary anchor uniquely resolves.

frame.description: Ordered iframe selector path from the document root to the frame containing this target; empty for the top-level document.

healEvent.description: Emitted by anchor resolution (player or tour_replay) whenever a step's primary anchor misses and a secondary anchor in the bundle uniquely resolves. Never emitted silently.
